title: Merging filtered views from multiple workspaces
excerpt: I have 3 workspaces and in each workspace I have a folder or board that I created a needs invoiced view.  Can i create another workspace that I can view all of the needs invoicing views in one location? If so how do i do…

posts.author: Annaque (Nathan Cross)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 3 workspaces and in each workspace I have a folder or board that I created a needs invoiced view. Can i create another workspace that I can view all of the needs invoicing views in one location? If so how do i do that.

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Annaque ~ Welcome to the Community!

To see information from several boards in one place, I would recommend checking out The Dashboards!

This gives you the options to use one of our many widget options, such as The Table Widget, The Chart Widget, or The Workload Widget to visually summarize data from several boards easily!

We also have a few resources for you that should help you understand better how to use monday.com as a reporting tool in general!

If you are new to monday.com we recommend you checking:

  • Our basic reporting webinar

  • Our basic reporting guide

If you already know the platform, then check out:

  • Our advanced reporting webinar
  • Our advanced reporting guide

Feel free to take a look and let us know if you still have questions about this!

If you’re interested in sending/creating invoices on monday.com as well check out this article for more details: Quotes & Invoices on monday.com

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna
